\tzpentry{ID11382}{S3 Fractional Volume Breathing Rate}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
The fractional volume rate of a breathing S3 is three times the Hubble breathing rate.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\frac{\dot V}{V}=3\frac{\dot R}{R}=3H
